commit_scope: Move mutable ideas/spec kernel routes from silence-as-fanout to implicit native invitation, with X-Form-Python-Fallback as the explicit refusal/control signal.

commands: COORD_AGENT=codex scripts/agent-coord.sh claim "native-default mutation invitation: no-header writes choose kernel path"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/native-mutation-trust-envelope.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-mutation-trust-envelope-band.fk form-stdlib/application-graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/native-mutation-side-effects.fk form-stdlib/native-mutation-route-side-effects.fk form-stdlib/native-idea-valuation-audit-ledger.fk form-stdlib/native-mutation-public-gate.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-mutation-public-gate-band.fk form-stdlib/channel-interface.fk form-stdlib/satsang.fk form-stdlib/satsang-flip-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-flip-witness-band.fk

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py ../deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py ../deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py
local_validation.summary: No-header mutable ideas/spec requests that reach the kernel-router now select native default invitation rows, emit native_default_invitation receipts, and use implicit-native-invitation in decision/trust envelopes. X-Form-Python-Fallback bypasses native route selection and fans out as an explicit refusal/control signal. Preview and public-gate receipts now name native-kernel default, explicit fallback, and candidate_count=4. Public Traefik no-header default remains on FastAPI until HTTP native mutation execution preserves production persistence semantics.

known_limitations.observed: Kernel HTTP mutation responses still keep executes:false; live persistence is proven through throwaway Postgres Form scripts, not production HTTP DB writes.
The deploy overlay remains header-gated for public traffic. Public no-header Traefik default is intentionally held until persistence-preserving native HTTP execution is wired.
X-Form-Python-Fallback is a universal Rust router bypass signal in this change, so any request carrying it fans out instead of selecting native routes.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub checks for codex/native-default-mutation-invitation-20260609.

deploy_validation.notes: No production deploy attempted before PR merge. Public verification should run after merge/deploy with scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Local kernel-router mutable paths now observe A=no-header native default invitation, B=X-Form-Native-Preview SQL preview, C=X-Form-Native-Public-Gate public-gate receipt, and D=X-Form-Python-Fallback fanout.
test_flows: python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> confidence 1.0, native default + preview + fallback
python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py --json -> confidence 1.0, native default + preview + public gate + fallback
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q focused native mutation tests -> 44 passed

phase_gate.reason: Local native-default invitation is proven. Public Traefik no-header default should move only after the HTTP native mutation handler preserves production persistence semantics instead of returning non-executing receipt previews.
